name: Vasona Lion Safari
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A dedicated conservation park spreading over 20 hectares where visitors can take a caged van ride to spot majestic Asiatic lions in a natural forest environment.
history: Established to conserve the Asiatic lion and serve as a breeding center. The lions here were originally brought from the Gir Forest in Gujarat.
famousFor: Asiatic lion sightings and guided van safari.
